question: Based on the chart data, during which period did the river water level change by the larger amount overall?

options.B: Both 1995-1998 and 2002-2005 have about the same overall change

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 1995-1998: 260 cm → 35 cm (change 225 cm); 2002-2005: 30 cm → 250 cm (change 220 cm).
